scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/tool-definitions.v1.json dist/tool-definitions.v1.json && cp src/runtime-manifest.v1.json dist/runtime-manifest.v1.json
scripts.test: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/tool-definitions.v1.json dist/tool-definitions.v1.json && cp src/runtime-manifest.v1.json dist/runtime-manifest.v1.json && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && cp src/tool-definitions.v1.json dist-test/src/tool-definitions.v1.json && cp src/runtime-manifest.v1.json dist-test/src/runtime-manifest.v1.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
